meta.title: Particle Differences Related to Aphid-Transmissibility of a Plant Virus

abstractHtml: The particles of bottom component of aphid-transmitted isolates of pea enation mosaic virus form multiple bands when electrophoresed in polyacrylamide gels; those of bottom component of non aphid-transmitted isolates form a single band. The particles in the multiple bands are separated on size, which is correlated with the presence of an extra protein. The structure of these particles is discussed as is their significance in relation to aphid transmissibility.
